title: Caldera - Network Configuration Recon via ipconfig and route (Windows)
description: Detects ipconfig and route commands used by Caldera T1016 discovery emulation on Windows. The operation chains ipconfig /all, route print, and arp -a to enumerate all interfaces, gateway routes, and ARP cache for network mapping. This process_creation level rule complements the discovery/caldera_t1016 rule with specific binary-level matching.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\ipconfig.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*\\route.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*print*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\arp.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*-a*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\nbtstat.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*-n*' or 'Command Line' like '*-r*' or 'Command Line' like '*-s*')))
